landing.badge: The ultimate portfolio builder for developers
landing.subtitle: Everything you need to showcase your skills, projects, and experience. No coding required. Just your talent, beautifully displayed.
landing.featuresSubtitle: We provide all the tools you need to stand out from the crowd and land your dream job.
landing.feature1Desc: Easily organize your sections, projects, and skills with our intuitive visual editor.
landing.feature2Desc: Choose from professionally designed templates or create your own unique look.
landing.feature3Desc: Track your visitors, see which projects get the most attention, and more.

auth.loginToContinue: Log in to your account to continue

logoutModal.title: Logout
logoutModal.message: Are you sure you want to log out of your account? You will need to log back in to access your portfolio builder.

slugModal.title: Choose Your Portfolio URL
slugModal.message: This URL will be the unique link to your portfolio. You can only set this once.
slugModal.mustFormat: Can only contain letters, numbers, and dashes (-)
slugModal.helpText: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes. Example:

validation.format: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes (-). Cannot start/end with a dash.

welcome.creator: Creator
welcome.desc1: Welcome to the DevFolio dashboard. Your portfolio has been viewed by

profile.title: Complete Profile
profile.desc: Add name, bio and profile photo.

section.title: Add Sections
section.desc: Activate at least 1 section in the portfolio.

project.title: Add Project
project.desc: Enter at least 1 of your best projects.

publish.title: Publish Portfolio
publish.desc: Set a custom URL so that it can be accessed by the public.

topProjects.title: Most Popular Projects
topProjects.desc: The performance of your work in the eyes of visitors.
topProjects.empty: There is no view data for your project yet.

themes.title: Templates & Themes
themes.subtitle: Customize the look and feel of your public portfolio.

minimalist.name: Minimalist
minimalist.desc: Clean and simple design focusing on content.

developerDark.name: Developer Dark
developerDark.desc: Dark theme perfect for showcasing code and tech stacks.

creative.name: Creative
creative.desc: Vibrant and colorful layout for designers and creatives.

executive.name: Executive
executive.desc: Professional and formal layout for business professionals.

bentoGrid.name: Bento Grid
bentoGrid.desc: Modern Apple-style grid layout that highlights different skills efficiently.

neoBrutalism.name: Neo-Brutalism
neoBrutalism.desc: Bold borders and high contrast colors for a trendy, unapologetic look.

glassmorphism.name: Glassmorphism
glassmorphism.desc: Frosted glass effects over colorful gradients for a sleek modern UI.

linkInBio.name: Link in Bio
linkInBio.desc: Compact vertical layout optimized for mobile screens and social media.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Help us make it better by providing suggestions, criticism, or reporting bugs on this application.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: Tell me in detail about the feedback you want to convey...
feedback.imagePlaceholder: Click to upload image or screenshot
feedback.imageErrorMessage: Some files are rejected because they are not supported image formats (JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP)
feedback.successMessage: Thank you for your feedback! Report has been sent.
feedback.submitErrorMessage: An error occurred while sending feedback. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your portfolio profile and preferences

profile.emailHelp: Email is used for login and is not displayed publicly.
profile.oauthNotice: This profile is connected to your {{provider}} account. Profile changes must be made through the service provider.

security.twoFactorDesc: Secure your account using an additional OTP code.
security.activeSessionsDesc: Always allow monitoring of logged-in devices.
security.hideFromSearchDesc: Prevent Google from indexing your public portfolio page.

disable2fa.description: Are you sure you want to turn off two-factor authentication?

setup2fa.step1Desc: Open your authenticator app and scan the following QR code:
setup2fa.unableToScan: Unable to scan? Use setup key
setup2fa.step2Desc: Enter the 6-digit code generated by your app:
setup2fa.invalidCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.

about.title: About Application
about.subtitle: Portfolio Builder Platform
about.description: DevFolio is a modern portfolio builder platform designed for developers, designers, and professional creators. With DevFolio, you can quickly and easily build and publish your portfolio.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how DevFolio collects, uses, and protects your personal information when using our services.
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly when creating an account, building a portfolio, and contacting our support. This includes your name, email, and professional data.
privacy.section2Content: Your information is used to operate, maintain, and provide the features of our services, as well as to communicate with you regarding your account or services.
privacy.section3Content: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or destruction.

settings.logoutConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to log out of the system?
settings.generalError: An error occurred. Please try again.

logout.title: Logout Confirmation
logout.message: Are you sure you want to log out of the system?

deleteAccount.title: Permanently Delete Account
deleteAccount.successMessage: An account deletion confirmation email has been sent.
deleteAccount.confirmationMessage: Are you sure you want to delete your account permanently?
deleteAccount.warningMessage1: You will receive an email to confirm account deletion.
deleteAccount.warningMessage2: If confirmed, all data (portfolio, projects, statistics) will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

toasts.toastSetup2FAFailed: Failed to setup 2FA. Please try again.
toasts.toastSessionEnabled: Active session monitoring has been enabled.
toasts.toastSessionDisabled: Active session monitoring has been disabled.

confirmDeleteAccount.defaultError: Failed to delete account. The token may have expired.
confirmDeleteAccount.loadingMessage: Please wait, we are processing your request.
confirmDeleteAccount.successMessage: All your data has been permanently deleted. You will be redirected...

forgotPassword.otpSentToEmail: An OTP code has been sent to your email.
forgotPassword.emailThirdParty: This email is registered through a third party.
forgotPassword.genericError: There is an error. Please try again.
forgotPassword.otpVerified: The OTP code has been successfully verified.
forgotPassword.otpExpired: The OTP code has expired. Please request a new code.
forgotPassword.otpResent: A new OTP code has been sent to your email.
forgotPassword.otpResendFailed: Failed to resend OTP code. Please try again.
forgotPassword.passwordResetSuccess: Password successfully reset. Please log in with your new password.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter the email address registered on your account. We will send an OTP code to reset the password.
forgotPassword.verifyOtpDesc: Enter the 6 digit code that has been sent to your email to confirm your identity.
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Create a new, strong password to secure your account.

verifyEmail.resendError: Failed to resend verification email. Please try again.
verifyEmail.title: Check Your Email
verifyEmail.description: We have sent a verification email to your email address. Please open the email and click the <1>"Confirm Account"</1> button to activate your account.
verifyEmail.step1: Open your email application (Gmail, Yahoo, etc)
verifyEmail.step2: Look for an email from DevFolio with the subject "Account Activation"
verifyEmail.step3: Click the "Confirm Account" button in the email
verifyEmail.step4: You will be directed to the login page to enter
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: The verification email has been resent!
verifyEmail.footerNote: Didn't receive the email? Check the <1>Spam</1> or <2>Junk</2> folder in your email. The verification link is valid for <3>24 hours</3>.
